title: Dungeon Overflow Near the Village
summary: Blue and his friends gather materials near the Cave of Spilled Crystals when a strong monster slips through an overflow and attacks.

title: The Crystal Falls from the Sky
summary: As Blue is about to die protecting his friend, a huge crystal crashes down from the sky, killing the monster and revealing the fairy Lyriel.

title: Rurik's Confession
summary: Rurik tells Blue the truth about Elaria's oath, his lost arm, and why he stayed instead of going to rescue her.
